value:
Thank you for reaching out. I understand you'd like to deactivate any active data bundles or services on both lines 08051148842 and 09052236815, and I'm happy to help with that right away.

I'll process the deactivation of all active services on these lines for you. You should see the changes reflected within the next few hours, and you won't be charged for any services going forward. If you have any questions or notice anything unusual on your account after this, please don't hesitate to get back to us.

We appreciate your business and apologize for any inconvenience.
